title: Legendary Weapons Mod
description: Do you ever wanted to have something better than ordinary diamond sword?
body:
Do you ever wanted to have something better than ordinary diamond sword?
Well don’t worry about that, this mod will add 11 legendary weapons, 5 special staffs, 14 elixirs, 14 new potion effects and 16 new types of blocks, 3 new dimensions, 10 new rings, 1 new mob and 8 new damage sources.
Each of these weapons have unique abilities and

Current Weapons:


Explosive Blade:
Has 5000 uses and deals 22 damage per hit.
Has 10% chance to cause massive explosion around the player.
Currently not otbainable in survival.


Whirlwind Blade:
Has 5000 uses and deals 10 damage per hit.
Will pierce though any armor and cause whirlwind around the player on every attack.
Currently not otbainable in survival.


Holy Punisher:
Has 5000 uses and deals 10 damage per hit.
Will deal 200% more damage to undead creatures(Zombies, Skeletons, Wither and etc).
Currently not otbainable in survival.


Christmas Special:
Has 5000 uses and deals 20 damage per hit.
This weapon will make anyone feel christmas spirit!
This weapon can be found in santas gift boxes(Only 5% chance to be dropped by the box!).


Soul Slasher:
Has 5000 uses and deals 10 damage per hit.
Has 10% chance to cut though 100% of the armor and take away 100% health of any enemy.
Currently not otbainable in survival.


Thunderstorm Blade:
Has 5000 uses and deals 14 damage per hit.
Will set anyone on fire and strike lightning from the skies above you.
Currently not otbainable in survival.


Snake’s Venom Blade:
Has 5000 uses and deals 10 damage per hit.
This weapon will cause massive poison on anyone it hits.
Currently not otbainable in survival.


Red Dragon’s Breathing Sword:
Has 5000 uses and deals 10 damage per hit.
This weapon will set anyone on fire and sometimes create fire rings around it’s wielder.
Currently not otbainable in survival.


Ultimate Flower Sword:
Has 5000 uses and deals 16 damage per hit.
Has 50% chance to steal lifes from enemies and spawn roses beneath it’s enemies(On grass only!).
Currently not otbainable in survival.
Blade Of Destruction:


Has 5000 uses and deals 14 damage per hit.
Has 30% chance to cause giant explosion around the player that will ignore mobgriefing and still break terrain.
Currently not otbainable in survival.
Blade Of Divinity:

Has 5000 uses and deals 1000 damage per hit and also deals 250 bonus divine damage.
This sword is forged by gods and can harm anything even immortal beings as well.
Currently not otbainable in survival.
Current Staffs:
Staff Of Fire:





Has 300 uses and deals 10 damage per hit.
Has 40 ticks cooldown when using special ability.
Will set enemies on fire on when attacking melee.
While holding and letting go right click will shoot barrage of fireballs to any place where you will look.
Staff Of Lightning:




Has 300 uses and deals 10 damage per hit.
Has 40 ticks cooldown when using special ability.
Allows you to strike lightning at any position that you will look.
Will set enemies on fire when attacking melee.
Staff Of Teleportation:




Has 300 uses and deals 10 damage per hit.
Has 40 ticks cooldown when using special ability.
Allows you to shoot ender pearl anywhere you want and has 25% chance to spawn endermite.
Staff Of Withering:




Has 300 uses and deals 10 damage per hit.
Has 40 ticks cooldown when using special ability.
Will wither enemies when attacking melee.
While holding and letting go right click will shoot barrage of wither skulls to any place where you will look.
Staff Of Explosions:




Has 300 uses and deals 10 damage per hit.
Has 40 ticks cooldown when using special ability.
While holding and letting go right click will shoot explosive missile that will explode over time.
Any mobs that will be near explosive missile will take 2 damage(damage would be player's melee damage) per hit. 
Misc Stuff:
Santa's Gift box:


Has a 10% chance to spawn on snow layer blocks in heigh of 50-75.
Has 5% chance to drop Christmas special when broken.
Mostly will drop coal, rarely will drop diamonds and emeralds.
Elixirs:
Elixir Of Immortality --> Will make player unkillable(Even by /kill command or void) for 60 seconds, can't be crafted yet.

Elixir Of Explosive Body --> Will transform you into walking creeper(On death player or mob will launch explosive missle towards the place where he/she looks), for 60 seconds, can't be crafted yet.

Elixir Of Water Healing --> Will make player regen health in water, this potion effect is 5 times faster than normal regeneration effect lasts for 60 seconds , can't be crafted yet.

Elixir Of Tornado Lifting --> In some way is same thing like levitation, but this is far more dangerous and deadly as well effect lasts for 60 seconds, can't be crafted yet!

Elixir Of Freezing Death  --> Imagine what would happen if you would eat some ice? Well you will freeze to death, effect lasts for 60 seconds, can't be crafted yet.

Elixir Of Luck --> Gives user random potion effect, system randomly selects 1 or 2 potion effects and gives it to user for 60 seconds.

Elixir Of The Forcefield --> Well i think i don't need to explain this... Any mob , arrow or projectile within 7x7x7 radius will be pushed back or upwards and living beings will take 2 lazer damage per second, some players or mobs might be squashed by it's power as well, effect lasts for 60 seconds, can't be crafted yet.

Elixir Of Bone Erosion --> This effect is quite deadly as it will start to break your bones overtime ? Well you will freeze to death, effect lasts for 60 seconds, can't be crafted yet.

Elixir Of Second Chance --> Allows user to revive once on death(Would be really usefull in hardcore mode!) , effect lasts for 60 seconds, can't be crafted yet.

Elixir Of Wither Resistance --> Makes you immune to wither , effect will last for 60 seconds, can't be crafted yet.

Elixir Of Poison Resistance --> Makes you immune to poison, effect will last for 60 seconds, can't be crafted yet.

Elixir Of Fall Resistance --> Makes you immune to fall damage, effect will last for 60 seconds, can't be crafted yet.

Elixir Of Flight --> Allows user to fly by holding space bar, effect will last for 60 seconds, can't be crafted yet.

Rings:

Ring Of Void –> Makes user immune to void damage and allows user to survive in Depths Of Void Dimension.
Ring Of Fire –> Makes users immune to any fire damage.
Ring Of Magic –> Makes user immune to any magic damage or negative potion effects.
Ring Of Gliding –> Makes user glide like a chicken.
Ring Of Flight –> Allows user fly while holding space.
Ring Of Explosions –> Makes user immune to explosion damage.
Ring Of Poison –> Makes user immune to poison damage.
Ring Of Wither –> Makes user immune to wither damage.
Ring Of Magnetism –> Moves exp and items towards the player.
Ring Of Protection –> Gives user protection III on equip.

Dimensions:
Water Abyss:

Water dimension filled with guardians and water dwellers first and only dimension that has been fully finished and it has 4 tool tiers.
This dimension is filled with water, prismarine and other blocks like hot prismarine as well.
Also there are some items related to this world like sea pearl that may or may not have some amazing use and is rare.
Aqua is basically like iron in overworld(It has same spawn rate).
Lazurite is 2x better and rarer then Aqua.
Primarite is basically diamond of this dimension has same rarity as well.
Oceanite ultimate material for this dimension has same rarity as emeralds.
Can be accesed by using Water Abyss Key.
Depths Of Void:


This dimension is currently empty but you will need ring of void to survive in it as otherwise it will kill you even in creative.

This dimension will be the last in your adventure only the strongest may survive there and shadow dwellers will inhabit this deadly world.

Can be accesed by using Depths Of Void Key.
Astral World:


Astral world aka world of spirits, this world will not allow you to fly even in creative strong force will hold you close to the ground.

Only worthy users that will wear ring of magic will be able to fly in there.

Can be accesed by using Astral Key.
 
Mod Copyright for mod packs/distribution: [https://www.rolikdevelopment.com/mod-copyright/]
 
 p.s be sure to suggest your own legendary weapons and ways how to otbain them!

Currently as it’s first release for two or three updates these weapons will stay for creative use only!

Also be sure to extract .jar file from .zip folder that mod will contain!
